pr.title: fix(kgi-gateway): /health note when logged_in but account_set=false
files_changed: services/kgi-gateway/schemas.py (+1 line, Optional[str] = None on HealthResponse)

1_pytest_all_green.command: cd services/kgi-gateway && PYTHONUTF8=1 python -m pytest tests/ -v

2_health_schema_note_field.detail: note: Optional[str] = None added to HealthResponse — backward-compatible (absent when None via FastAPI exclude_none behavior, but explicit null in JSON otherwise)
2_health_schema_note_field.note: Live gateway is pre-merge (W2b code f4d5b47), so /health live does NOT yet show note field — this is correct. Post-merge + restart will surface note when kgi_logged_in=true and account_set=false

3_health_before_after_login_readable.detail: Unit tests cover: (a) not logged in → 200 note=null; (b) logged_in but account not set → 200 note=guidance string; (c) fully healthy → 200 note=null. All 3 states return HTTP 200.

4_live_health_200.note: Running process is pre-merge W2b (f4d5b47). note field absent pre-merge — correct.

5_trades_200.detail: trades returned with note (account not set — expected state)

6_deals_200.detail: deals returned with note (account not set — expected state)

7_position_503.detail: POSITION_DISABLED circuit breaker active — not affected by PR #3

8_order_create_409.detail: W1 stub preserved — not affected by PR #3

9_static_scope_check.detail: app.py diff: only health() handler modified (+4 lines — note=None init, conditional note assignment, note= in HealthResponse constructor). All other handlers (session/*, position, trades, deals, quote/*, order/create) UNCHANGED. schemas.py diff: only HealthResponse +1 field (Optional[str] = None). No other schema classes modified.
9_static_scope_check.handler_count_unchanged: 14 routes on branch matches 14 routes on main (W2b merge)

11_secret_audit.detail: PR #3 diff contains '<REDACTED:KGI_ACCOUNT>' in test_health_account_set.py line 55 (patch.object _active_account='<REDACTED:KGI_ACCOUNT>'). This is the real KGI account number used as a mock fixture. HOWEVER: '<REDACTED:KGI_ACCOUNT>' was already present in committed main branch code pre-PR #3 (schemas.py lines 44,46,73 as docstring examples; README.md lines 88,97,108 as curl examples). PR #3 did NOT introduce this value to the repo — it already existed. Flagged for Elva/楊董 awareness. Recommendation: future tests should use a neutral sentinel like 'TEST_ACCT_MOCK' per redaction policy. [Redacted 2026-04-30 A2]

flag: account_number_<REDACTED:KGI_ACCOUNT>_in_test_fixture — pre-existing in repo, not new leak, but future tests should use sentinel. See redaction_policy_v1.md for guidance. [Redacted 2026-04-30 A2]
